page_metadata.biotools__summary: SymCurv is a computational ab initio method for nucleosome positioning prediction. It is based on the structural property of natural nucleosome forming sequences, to be symmetrically curved around a local minimum of curvature.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SymCurv is a computational ab initio method for nucleosome positioning prediction. It is based on the structural property of natural nucleosome forming sequences, to be symmetrically curved around a local minimum of curvature.
